import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import CTA from '../components/CTA'; import './Studio.css'; const TEAM = [ { name: 'Alex Morgan', role: 'Founder & Creative Director', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/ZbBWT6HbhupH7FIQ25kMqURKqgQ.png', }, { name: 'Sarah Chen', role: 'Lead UI/UX Designer', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/4R7HUMP3WUGx8mrykN4wq0PhGo.jpg', }, { name: 'Marcus Reid', role: 'Head of Development', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/PdVnZymDIiku8ywz3BUxAbly3U.png', }, { name: 'Nina Patel', role: 'Motion Design Lead', img: 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/i2sOp7CKOOg8s3DCiTAncc9YGY.png', }, ]; const AWARDS = [ { award: 'Best Digital Design Studio', org: 'Creative Excellence Awards', year: '2024' }, { award: 'Best UI/UX Design', org: 'Web Vision Awards', year: '2024' }, { award: 'Top 10 Web Agencies', org: 'Digital Creators List', year: '2024' }, { award: 'Top Branding Agency', org: 'Design Innovators Summit', year: '2023' }, { award: 'Outstanding Motion Graphics',org: 'Visual Impact Awards', year: '2023' }, ]; const CLIENT_LOGOS = [ 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/lBk7MKclfzJRlatPc13MvYtptk.svg', 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/OHfziRjK2HdoOgrAXlPXc55VYQ.svg', 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/C8vnHs7e8IbLZooep0gNip6eylU.svg', 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/KNj9BRJvdrtCaYx5m7um7EmT8.svg', 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/8wpt2H14XHcb4yoW182iK0MGxs.svg', 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/jqmWIOA4WlrHoWQKgzTtrOgybg.svg', 'https://framerusercontent.com/images/qNMZaMQpAKdhOYxA9xp6LSCc54.svg', ]; export default function Studio() { return (
{/* ── Hero ── */}
About the Studio

We're Scarlet. We design bold.

{/* ── Mission ── */}
Our mission

Founded in 2010, Scarlet has been at the forefront of digital design, helping brands craft identities and experiences that captivate, convert, and endure.

{/* Stats */}
{[ { num: '15+', label: 'Years of Experience' }, { num: '100+', label: 'Projects Completed' }, { num: '97%', label: 'Client Satisfaction' }, { num: '200+', label: 'Happy Clients' }, ].map(s => (
{s.num}
{s.label}
))}
{/* ── Studio photo ── */}
{/* ── Values ── */}
Our values

Bold creativity, precision craft, and a relentless focus on what makes your brand unforgettable.

Every project we take on is driven by strategy, creativity, and a commitment to excellence.

View projects ↗
{[ { title: 'Bold Creativity', desc: 'We push boundaries and challenge conventions to deliver designs that truly stand out in a crowded digital landscape.' }, { title: 'Precision Craft', desc: 'Every pixel matters. We obsess over details to ensure every deliverable meets the highest standards of quality.' }, { title: 'Client Partnership', desc: 'We treat every project as a collaboration, working closely with clients to bring their unique vision to life.' }, { title: 'Future Thinking', desc: 'We design with longevity in mind, creating solutions that adapt and grow with your brand over time.' }, ].map(v => (
✓

{v.title}

{v.desc}

))}
{/* Logo marquee */}
{[...CLIENT_LOGOS, ...CLIENT_LOGOS].map((l, i) => ( ))}
{/* ── Team ── */}
Our team

Meet the Scarlet Team.

A team of passionate creatives and designers with a bold vision and a detail-driven approach.

Contact us ↗
{TEAM.map((m, i) => (

{m.name}

{m.role}

))}
{/* ── Awards ── */}
Achievements

Awards &
Recognition.

We're proud to have our work recognized by industry leaders. Here are some of the accolades we've earned.

{AWARDS.map((a, i) => (
{a.award}
{a.org}
{a.year}
))}
); }
